name: OpenClawBridge
description: Bridge for delegating tasks to OpenClaw agents.

function.name: openclaw_delegate
function.description: Delegate a high-level or long-running task to a remote OpenClaw agent.

task.description: The description of the task to perform.

mode.description: Sync mode waits for a response. Async mode provides a webhook for later notification. Defaults to sync.

agentId.description: The identifier of the remote agent (e.g., 'jennifer'). Defaults to 'jennifer'.

context_snippets.description: Optional snippets from local memory or files to help the remote agent.
